intro: Do you have what it takes to answer a question only 1% of people get right? Test your brainpower and compete against players worldwide!
description:
The 1% Club World Challenge – Can YOU Beat the Odds?

The official game based on the hit TV gameshow!

Feel like a real contestant in the studio as you climb global leaderboards. No need to swot up on general knowledge — this game is all about logic, reasoning, and thinking differently.

Fun for all ages! With this game, an 8-year-old has as much chance of winning as an 80-year-old — it’s fun for all the family.

 - Play the official gameshow loved by millions
 - Challenge players worldwide
 - Climb multiple international leaderboards
 - Track your progress with detailed stats
 - Enjoy hundreds of unique questions with explanations
 - Experience authentic 3D studio visuals
 - Hear the iconic music and sounds from the show

Are you ready to join The 1% Club? Download now and prove you belong at the top!
